description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9). The job should check out the code, set up Python, upgrade pip, install dependencies, and then install various tools (Z3, Bitwuzla, Capstone, Unicorn, LIEF) and finally compile and test Triton.
